mnemonics: HISS: Hardware, Integration, Scalability, Security - the four pillars of data warehouse infrastructure
keyPoints: Infrastructure provides the physical and logical foundation for data storage, processing, and access
Proper infrastructure ensures data availability, reliability, and performance for business intelligence
Infrastructure components include servers, storage systems, networking, and database management systems
commonMistakes: Underestimating future data growth and scalability needs
Neglecting security measures in the infrastructure design phase
Focusing only on storage capacity without considering processing power requirements
